source_equations_extracted: inflation target process from paper prose near equation (12)
implementation_cross_check_items: flexible-price counterpart block for policy output objective
shock AR(1) implementation names and calibration values
known_uncertainties: OCR renders the external finance elasticity symbol as a dash in prose; derivation uses epsilon following formulas and .mod.
Investment-shock normalization differs between the paper equation text and the MMB implementation.
The paper does not print complete nonlinear household, firm, capital-producer, or entrepreneur optimization programs.

runtime_validation.notes: User explicitly requested not to run Dynare; .mod was used only as implementation_cross_check.
